scenes.title: Star Notation
scenes.description: Test scene for * inside LaTeX — adjoint operators, C*-algebras, convolution. The adjoint $T^*$ of an operator $T$ satisfies $\langle Tx, y \rangle = \langle x, T^* y \rangle$.

steps.title: Adjoints
steps.description: Given $T^*$ and $S^*$, the product satisfies $(TS)^* = S^* T^*$.

steps.title: C*-algebras
steps.description: A $C^*$-algebra satisfies $\|a^* a\| = \|a\|^2$. The **norm identity** $\|a^*a\| = \|a\|^2$ is key.

steps.title: Convolution
steps.description: Convolution $f * g$ is defined as $(f * g)(t) = \int f(\tau)\,g(t - \tau)\,d\tau$.

steps.title: Mixed bold and star
steps.description: **Key result:** $T^*$ is bounded. Also **note that $A^*$ is closed** under addition.

steps.title: Two starred terms
steps.description: Both $T^*$ and $S^*$ are self-adjoint when $T^* = T$ and $S^* = S$.

steps.title: Bare asterisk multiplication
steps.description: In some notation $A*B$ means group multiplication, distinct from $A \cdot B$.
